div.p: Upgrade to the latest Odoo version with confidence—preserving data integrity, porting custom modules, and minimizing downtime through a proven migration framework.

div.h2: Odoo Migration Services Move to the Latest Version Without Losing a Single Record

div.p: From legacy systems to the latest Odoo version, we handle complex migrations with precision ensuring your data, workflows, and custom modules work perfectly after the transition.

div.class: partner-image-box border-0 bg-transparent d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

img.style: object-fit: contain; transform: scale(1.4); transform-origin: left center; z-index: 1;

div.h2: What is Odoo Migration And Why Does Your Business Need It?
div.p: Odoo migration is the process of moving your existing Odoo system, its data, configurations, custom modules, and integrations from one version or environment to another. It is one of the most technically complex operations in the Odoo lifecycle, and when done incorrectly, it can result in data loss, broken workflows, and costly downtime.

Moving your system from an older Odoo version to a newer one for example, from Odoo v14 or v15 to Odoo v17 or v18. This involves migrating your database structure, porting your custom modules to the new Odoo API, and ensuring all workflows and integrations continue to function correctly in the upgraded environment.

Transferring business data from a non-Odoo system such as Tally, SAP Business One, QuickBooks, Microsoft Dynamics, or a custom legacy ERP into Odoo for the first time. This involves data cleansing, mapping, transformation, and validation to ensure your historical records arrive in Odoo accurately and completely.

Moving your on-premise Odoo installation to a cloud hosting environment such as Odoo.sh, AWS, Google Cloud, or a managed cloud server to improve performance, accessibility, and scalability without the overhead of managing physical infrastructure.

div.h2: Is Your Current Odoo Setup Holding You Back?
div.p: If your business is facing any of these challenges, it may be a clear sign that your Odoo system needs an upgrade or migration:
Running on outdated Odoo versions (v12–v15) with no active support or security updates.
Frequent errors or failed updates that make your system unstable.
Missing out on new features available in the latest Odoo versions.
Heavy customizations that are difficult to manage or slow down your system.
Using legacy software like Tally, SAP, or QuickBooks and planning to switch to Odoo.
Poor performance or downtime due to outdated servers or infrastructure.

div.h2: Do You Have a Migration Need?

div.p: A well-executed Odoo migration process is structured, transparent, and test-driven. Here is exactly how we manage every migration at Creyox:
Before any work begins, we conduct a thorough assessment of your current Odoo environment version, database size, number of custom modules, third-party integrations, and current infrastructure.

Based on the assessment, we build a detailed migration plan including the migration path, data mapping specifications, module porting scope, testing plan, cutover window, rollback plan, and milestones.

We set up a dedicated staging environment, a mirror of your production setup where the entire migration is executed, tested, and validated before anything touches your live system. Your business continues running without interruption during this phase.
We execute the migration on the staging environment migrating the database, porting and refactoring all custom modules, rebuilding integrations, and configuring the new version.
Your team runs through every critical business workflow in the staged environment sales, purchasing, inventory, accounting, manufacturing, HR. Issues are tracked, resolved, and re-tested.
We execute the production migration during a planned low-traffic window typically a weekend or overnight. The cutover follows a precise sequence with real-time monitoring.

The migration doesn't end at go-live. We provide dedicated post-migration support monitoring for issues, resolving any post-cutover bugs, training users on new features, and optimizing system performance.

div.h2: How We Protect Your Business During Odoo Migration
div.p: The two biggest fears every business has about Odoo migration are data loss and operational downtime. Here is exactly how we address both:
We take a complete backup of your database, filestore, and all attachments before any migration work begins. All data transformations are run on a staging copy never on your live data.
We rehearse the production cutover multiple times on staging before the real thing. We schedule cutovers during your business's lowest-traffic window so impact on daily operations is near-zero.
Before every production cutover, we prepare and test a full rollback plan. If anything unexpected happens, we can revert to your previous system state within a defined timeframe.
Every migration we do is rehearsed in full on a staging environment before the production cutover. Your team validates every workflow, and only after full sign-off do we proceed.
Our team actively monitors your new Odoo environment watching for errors, performance issues, and any unexpected behaviour so issues are caught and resolved before they affect your team.

div.h2: Why Choose Creyox as Your Odoo Migration Partner?
div.p: Choosing the right Odoo migration partner can make the difference between a smooth transition and a costly, disruptive experience. Here’s what sets Creyox apart.
We audit your entire setup before touching anything versions, modules, dependencies, and infrastructure.
Your data arrives clean. We normalize, deduplicate, and map every field to the latest Odoo structure.
Your custom modules come with you. We refactor and modernize them to work natively on the new version.
From any older Odoo release to the latest stable version handled with best-practice steps and zero guesswork.
Every record, every relationship. Safe export, clean import, full backups, and a rollback plan.
Nothing goes live unverified. Automated and manual tests confirm your data, workflows, and modules.
Your business doesn't pause for migration. Staged rehearsals and controlled switch-overs keep disruption minimal.
Your new environment is locked down from day one hardened configs, access reviews, and full audit trails.
Migration is also a performance upgrade. We tune your hosting, caching, and workers for speed.
Hypercare, bug fixes, and fine-tuning keep your system stable after go-live.
v12 to v18, Tally, SAP, multi-database, on-premise to cloud you're not our learning curve.
No outsourcing, no freelancers. The person answering your question is the person doing the work.
Shared tracker, regular updates, direct team access you always know exactly where things stand.

div.h2: What's Your Migration Scenario? We've Handled It.
div.p: Every business comes to us with a different starting point. Here are the most common migration scenarios we manage:
Upgrade with a structured process that ensures your data and modules continue working smoothly.

div.h3: Legacy ERP to Odoo (Tally / SAP / QuickBooks)
div.p: Move to Odoo with clean data migration, proper mapping, and a fully configured ERP.
Handle complex, multi-step migrations with careful data transformation and complete module compatibility.
Shift from local servers to a secure, high-performance cloud setup with improved accessibility and system reliability.
Merge multiple Odoo instances into a single, unified system with accurate data mapping and multi-company setup.

div.h2: What Your Business Gains from Odoo Version Migration

div.p: Leverage the latest capabilities including improved automation, smarter reporting, and modern business tools.
Experience quicker load times, smoother workflows, and better system responsiveness for your entire team.
Stay protected with the latest security updates, bug fixes, and system improvements that reduce risks.
Prepare your business for growth with a system that supports new integrations, users, and evolving needs.
Eliminate outdated customizations and redundant data, giving you a cleaner, more maintainable system.
Benefit from a modern interface and enhanced mobile usability, making it easier for your team to work anywhere.

div.h2: Not Sure if You're Ready to Migrate? Start with a Free Assessment.
div.p: You don't have to commit to a migration to get our honest opinion. Our free migration assessment gives you a clear picture of your current Odoo environment, what a migration would involve, and what it would cost so you can make an informed decision.
